metadata.title: GPT Image 2 – AI Image Generator
metadata.description: Generate and edit images with GPT Image 2. Nano Banana Pro, Seedream, Flux, and Gemini 3 Pro – all behind one prompt, with text-to-image and image-to-image modes.

page.title: GPT Image 2 – AI Image Generator
page.description: One prompt box, every major AI image model. Generate from text or edit from a reference – with resolution, format, and aspect ratio controls.

generator.title: Image Generator
generator.description: Generate images with AI models, support text-to-image and image-to-image.

form.prompt_placeholder: Describe the details of the image, such as color, shape, texture, etc.
form.prompt_required_hint: Add a prompt to start generating.
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload reference images, support multiple images
form.reference_image_required_hint: Upload at least one reference image to continue.
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Some images failed to upload, please delete them and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content

preview.ready_description_image: Upload an image and describe your edits
preview.ready_description_text: Describe the image you want to generate
